ingredients.name: Nightshade
ingredients.description: A dark berry with potent properties.

ingredients.name: Silverleaf
ingredients.description: A shimmering leaf known for healing.

ingredients.name: Embercap
ingredients.description: A mushroom that glows faintly red.

ingredients.name: Frostroot
ingredients.description: A cold root that chills to the touch.

ingredients.name: Voidmoss
ingredients.description: Grows only in places of great darkness.

ingredients.name: Sunpetal
ingredients.description: Warm and fragrant, used in light brews.

ingredients.name: Moonbloom
ingredients.description: A pale flower that blooms only under moonlight.

ingredients.name: Ashwood Bark
ingredients.description: Charred bark from a tree struck by lightning.

ingredients.name: Stormcap
ingredients.description: A mushroom that crackles faintly with static charge.

ingredients.name: Crimson Spore
ingredients.description: A blood-red spore with a faint, acrid smell.

ingredients.name: Dewglass
ingredients.description: Morning dew crystallized into fragile beads overnight.

ingredients.name: Thornvine
ingredients.description: A creeping vine whose purple sap stains the fingers.

recipes.name: Potion of Shadow
recipes.description: A dangerous brew that shrouds the drinker in darkness.

recipes.name: Healing Draught
recipes.description: A gentle remedy that mends wounds.

recipes.name: Frost Elixir
recipes.description: Slows the blood and sharpens the mind.

recipes.name: Venom of the Void
recipes.description: A three-part brew of terrifying potency.

recipes.name: Moonwater Tonic
recipes.description: A clear, luminous tonic that soothes restless minds.

recipes.name: Thunderclap Draft
recipes.description: Rattles the bones and sharpens reflexes to a dangerous edge.

recipes.name: Blight of the Briar
recipes.description: A slow-acting brew of terrible consequence.

recipes.name: Grand Tempest
recipes.description: A storm in a bottle — wild, unstable, and awe-inspiring.
